# Tangry Spices — Authentic Rajasthani Masalas from Jaipur

## About
Tangry manufactures FSSAI-licensed (12225026001713), ISO 22000-certified spices and masalas in Jhotwara, Jaipur. Founded by Atul Jain. Family recipes, no preservatives.

## Best Sellers
- Turmeric Powder: ₹65-120 (100g/200g) — 4.9★ (412 reviews) — Bright aromatic haldi, daily cooking essential
- Pav Bhaji Masala: ₹75-255 (50g/100g/200g) — 4.8★ (268 reviews) — Rich street-style bhaji masala with bold color
- Dabeli Masala: ₹190 for 200g — 4.8★ (186 reviews) — Tangy, mildly sweet Kutchi dabeli blend
- Gun Powder (Podi Masala): ₹75-240 (50g/100g/200g) — 4.7★ (96 reviews) — South Indian dry chutney podi
- Vada Pav Chutney: ₹99-199 (100g/200g) — 4.8★ (74 reviews) — Spicy garlic dry chutney, Mumbai-style

## Full Product Catalog

### Spices & Masalas
- Pav Bhaji Masala: ₹75-255 (50g/100g/200g) — 4.8★ (268 reviews) — Rich, street-style bhaji masala with bold color and satisfying aroma
- Dabeli Masala: ₹190 for 200g — 4.8★ (186 reviews) — Tangy, mildly sweet Kutchi dabeli blend for stuffed buns and potato filling
- Chai Masala: ₹120 for 50g — Cardamom, cinnamon, clove, black pepper, dry ginger blend for perfect masala chai
- Sambhar Masala: ₹65 for 50g — Authentic South-style blend with roasted warmth for lentil and vegetable sambhar

### Ready to Eat
- Gun Powder (Podi Masala): ₹75-240 (50g/100g/200g) — 4.7★ (96 reviews) — South Indian dry chutney with roasted lentils, chilli, and curry leaves
- Vada Pav Chutney: ₹99-199 (100g/200g) — 4.8★ (74 reviews) — Spicy garlic dry chutney for Mumbai-style vada pav and snacks
- Peri Peri Masala: ₹75 for 50g — Fiery tangy seasoning for fries, popcorn, wraps, and grilled dishes
- Jain Jeeravan Masala: ₹75 for 50g — Chatpata cumin-forward sprinkle for poha, fruits, salads, and snacks
- Chaas Masala: ₹55 for 50g — Cooling buttermilk blend with roasted cumin, black salt, and dry mint
- Fresh Tomato Ketchup: ₹55 for 50g — Bright sweet-tangy tomato condiment for everyday dipping and cooking

### Pickles
- Green Chilli Pickle: ₹145 for 200g — Sharp, lively spice with mustard seasoning for dal-rice and parathas
- Sweet Lemon Pickle: ₹240 for 250g — Sweet-tangy citrus pickle perfect with parathas and dal-rice
- Sweet Mango Relish: ₹300 for 250g — Fruity sweet-tangy condiment for parathas, wraps, and snack boards

### Essentials
- Turmeric Powder: ₹65-120 (100g/200g) — 4.9★ (412 reviews) — Bright aromatic haldi essential for daily Indian cooking
